/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librcl_logging_noop.so -o librcl_logging_noop.so CMakeFiles/rcl_logging_noop.dir/src/rcl_logging_noop/rcl_logging_noop.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib/librcl_logging_interface.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
